title: 虚无之塔
description:
Tower of VoidTower of Void is a tactical RPG infused with roguelike elements. Lead your party of adventurers to climb a mysterious tower, where each floor features distinct enemy layouts and area rules.

Core CombatUp to 5 characters can be deployed on the dual 9-grid battlefield. Battles run fully automatically: characters and enemies launch basic attacks based on attack speed, and unleash ultimate skills once their rage gauge is full.

Class Promotion SystemThere are 5 base classes: Warrior, Mage, Archer, Assassin and Pirate. Each base class can branch into 4 advanced classes at Level 10, totaling 20 advanced classes. Every class comes with exclusive passive abilities, combat tactics and rage skills.

Formation EffectsFormation bonuses are activated based on class combinations. Different positioning grants different formation buffs.

Buff SystemThe game features over 30 types of buffs, which can stack with one another. Each character can hold 4 to 5 buffs simultaneously.

Equipment & Skill TomesDefeated foes drop equipment (4 gear slots across 3 rarity tiers) and skill tomes for passive abilities. Equipment carries random attributes, and skill tomes can be learned into passive skill slots.

Academy RecruitmentRecruit new characters of any base class and raise them from Level 1.

Entrance Choice MechanicWill you take the Solid Path for steady progress, or the Unstable Path filled with risks and greater rewards? The choice is yours. You may also stumble upon Void Rifts waiting to be explored.
description_short: Tower of Void is a tactical roguelike RPG. It features formation strategy, auto combat, loot farming and class progression. The core fun lies in building lineups, adjusting positions, equipping skills and gear to counter diverse enemies.
